visual_description:
The audio opens with a slow, melancholic instrumental piece. A lone, mournful melody, likely played on a string instrument, creates a somber and suspenseful atmosphere, evoking a sense of quiet tension and melancholy. The scene is extremely dark, illuminated only by a single, high-angle light source from above. In the center of the frame, two figures are partially visible. One person, on the left, is sitting and appears to be holding their hand to their face. To the right, another person is crouched near some tall grass. The figures are silhouetted against the light, making their features indistinct. The setting is a dark, outdoor space at night. The ground is covered in what looks like tall grass or reeds. In the top right corner, the white Chinese characters "风行网" are visible. The camera remains stationary, holding a medium shot of the two figures. The music is the sole focus of the audio, with no dialogue or other sound effects present.
